keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY STOOL. Stool, acrid : Ars., Carb-v., Chin., Colch., Gamb., Ign., Iris., Merc., Pul., Sul. Stool, aggravation from : Dios., Merc-c., Merc. Stool, amelioration from : Coloc., Gamb., Nux-v. Stool, bad odor : Ars., Asaf., Bapt., Carb-v., Nux-v., Pod., Psor., Pul., Sul. Stool, black : Ars., Lept., Stram., Ver-a. Stool, black, tarry : Chio., Lept. Stool, bloody : Canth., Ham., Ip., Merc-c., Merc., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Stool, bloody, streaked : Sul. Stool, bloody, water : Rhus-t. Stool, changeable : Cham., Dulc., Pul. Stool, chill , with : Ars., Coloc., Lac-c., Merc., Pul., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, constipated : Bry., Calc-c., Cocc., Grap., Lach., Lyc., Nux-v., Op., Plb., Psor., Sanic., Sil., Stap., Sul. Stool, constipated, alternate days : Calc-c., Cocc., Kali-c., Lyc., Nat-m. Stool, constipated, chronic : Bry., Grap., Nux-v., Op., Plb., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, constipated, hard fæces, from : Bry., Mag-m., Nux-v., Op., Plb., Verb. Stool, constipated, inactivity, from : Alu., Hep., Kali-c., Nat-m., Nux-v. Stool, constipation, of infants : Plb. Stool, crumbling : Mag-m., Nat-m. Stool, dark , brown : Ars., Bry., Grap., Nux-v., Psor. Stool, diarrha : Alo., Ars., Cham., Chin., Cina., Coloc., Con., Crot-t., Gamb., Iris., Merc., Nat-s., Pho-ac., Pho., Pod., Psor., Pul., Rhe., Rhus-t., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, diarrha, chronic : Ars., Calc-c., Pho., Sul. Stool, diarrha, constipation, alternating with : Ant-c., Calc-c., Chel., Lyc., Nat-s., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Pul. Stool, diarrha, drinking, agg. : Arg-n., Ars., Crot-t. Stool, diarrha, eating, agg. : Alo., Ars., Chin., Coloc., Crot-t., Fer., Nux-v., Pod. Stool, diarrha, menses, agg. : Bov., Caust., Lach., Nat-s., Pul., Ver-a., Vib. Stool, diarrha, morning : Alo., Bry., Kali-bi., Lil-t., Nat-s., Pod., Rum., Sul. Stool, diarrha, nervous ; emotions, agg. : Aco., Arg-n., Cham., Cof., Gels., Hyo., Ign., Op., Pod., Pul., Ver-a. Stool, diarrha, nightly : Fer. Stool, diarrha, painful : Ars., Bry., Cham., Coloc., Merc-c., Merc., Rhe., Rhus-t., Sul. Stool, diarrha, painless : Ars., Chin., Fer., Hyo., Lyc., Pho-ac., Pho., Pod., Pul., Stram., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, diarrha, weather, hot, agg. : Bry., Pod. Stool, difficult : Bry., Chin., Mag-m., Nat-m., Nux-v. Stool, difficult, although soft : Alu., Chin., Hep., Nux-m., Psor., Pul., Sep., Sil., Stap. Stool, dry : Bry., Nat-m. Stool, dysenteric : Canth., Caps., Coloc., Ip., Merc-c., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sul. Stool, eggs, like bad : Cham. Stool, flatulent : Agar., Alo., Arg-n., Crot-t., Fer., Ign., Nat-s. Stool, frequent : Aco., Calc-c., Cham., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pod., Ver-a. Stool, gelatinous : Alo. Stool, granular , sandy, etc. : Arg-m., Bell., Hyds., Mang., Mez., Pho. Stool, grass green : Aco., Ant-t., Arg-n., Cham., Ip., Iris., Merc-d., Merc. Stool, gushing , pouring : Alo., Bry., Crot-t., Gamb., Jat., Pod., Sang., Sec-c., Ver-a. Stool, hacked , chopped : Aco., Cham., Sul-ac. Stool, hard : Alu., Bry., Grap., Mag-m., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Plb., Sil., Sul. Stool, hot : Alo., Ars., Asclep., Bell., Caps., Cham., Gamb., Iris., Merc-c., Pic-ac., Pod., Sul. Stool, insufficient : Arn., Caps., Cham., Lyc., Mag-m., Merc-c., Nat-c., Nux-v., Sul. Stool, involuntary , hurried, etc. : Alo., Ap., Arn., Bar-c., Gels., Hyo., Pho-ac., Pho., Pod., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, involuntary, although solid : Alo., Ars., Caust., Coloc., Hyo. Stool, knotty , lumpy, like sheep dung, of little balls : Alu., Bell., Calc-c., Grap., Hyds., Mag-c., Mag-m., Merc., Op., Plb., Sep., Sil., Sul., Verb. Stool, knotty, lumpy, of little balls, chalky : Bell., Calc-c. Stool, knotty, lumpy, of little balls, tallow : Mag-c. Stool, large caliber : Bry., Grap., Kali-c., Lyc., Sanic., Ver-a. Stool, meat water , like : Canth., Pho., Pod., Rhus-t. Stool, mucus : Arg-n., Ars., Asar., Bor., Caps., Cham., Colch., Grap., Hell., Ip., Kali-m., Merc-c., Merc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Stool, mucus, bloody : Merc-c., Merc. Stool, mucus, coated : Am-m., Cham., Grap., Hyds., Pul. Stool, mucus, lumps of : Alo., Spig. Stool, noisy : Arg-n., Nat-s., Thu. Stool, pasty , sticky : Chel., Kali-bi., Merc., Plat., Rhe., Sul. Stool, prostrating : Ars., Ver-a. Stool, prostrating, not : Ap., Pho-ac. Stool, red : Lyc., Merc., Rhus-t. Stool, retained : Cocc., Sil., Stram. Stool, rice water : Cam., Ver-a. Stool, scanty , but frequent : Ars., Merc-c., Nux-v. Stool, scum , floating on : Asclep., Bry., Grat., Mag-c., Sal-ac., Sanic. Stool, shreddy : Arg-n., Canth., Merc-c. Stool, slender : Caust., Pho. Stool, soft , mushy, etc. : Chin., Nit-ac., Pho., Pul., Sul. Stool, sour : Calc-c., Hep., Mag-c., Merc., Nat-p., Rhe., Sul. Stool, standing , amel. : Caust. Stool, undigested : Ars., Calc-c., Chin., Fer., Old., Pho-ac. Stool, wheyey : Cup., Iod. Stool, white , gray, etc. : Ars., Calc-c., Chel., Dig., Kali-c., Lach., Merc., Op., Pho-ac., Pho., Pod. Stool, worms : Aco., Calc-c., Chin., Cina., Ign., Merc., Nat-p., Saba., Sil., Spig., Sul. Stool, worms, pinworms : Calc-c., Chin., Fer., Ign., Mar-v., Sul. Stool, worms, tapeworm : Calc-c., Grap., Plat., Pul., Saba., Sil., Sul. Stool, yellow : Ars., Crot-t., Merc., Pod. Stool, yellow, bright : Aeth., Alo., Chel., Colch., Gels., Kali-p., Nux-m., Pho., Pod., Sul-ac. Stool, concomitants , before stool : Calc-c., Merc., Nux-v., Ver-a. Stool, concomitants, during stool : Ars., Cham., Merc., Pul., Sul., Ver-a. Stool, concomitants, after stool : Caust., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Sele. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
